stories.title: Expect surprises, not just PSG attack vs. Arsenal ...
stories.summary: Both managers have plenty of tricks up their sleeve to change the game entirely.

stories.title: Champions League finals often disappoint, but PSG ...
stories.summary: When was the last time both teams scored in a Champions League final? Will PSG vs. Arsenal be any different?

stories.title: NCAA: Sorsby's college career should be over
stories.summary: The NCAA says it would become the first major American sports league to allow an athlete who bet on their own games to continue to compete if a district court were to grant Texas Tech's Brendan Sorsby an injunction allowing him to play this season.

stories.title: Slot exits Liverpool one year after EPL triumph
stories.summary: Liverpool have confirmed head coach Arne Slot will leave the club with immediate effect.

stories.title: Osaka shows out, sets up Sabalenka showdown
stories.summary: Four-time Grand Slam champion Naomi Osaka has advanced to the fourth round at Roland Garros for the first time in her career, where she will face top-ranked Aryna Sabalenka.
